meaning: n.(受过偷窃技术专门训练被雇作间谍或刺客的)日本武士
examples: Do not be fooled by this slick ninja!
She enjoys her ninja suit so much that her handlers say she tries to swim away any time they approach her to remove it.
The poster for Ninja Assassin features Rain but half of his face is off the page.
The team followed Ninja Cow for miles over rough terrain, across snow and ice.
